speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain aur mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai, thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi. Aaj meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri aukaat dikha di, shayad tabhi se ye haal hai. Upar se gaon mein Monsoon fail hone se meri fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai. Mujhe bas ye sir dard thik karna hai taaki main dobara khet aur kaam sambhaal sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To establish trust by mirroring the exact body complaint as required for Somatization using Lens A.
text: Tumhare sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, aur sharir bilkul toot raha hai... yeh thakan sach mein bohot bhaari pad rahi hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aankhein kholna bhi mushkil lag raha hai. Boss ne sabke samne chillaya... gaon mein sabko pata chalega toh izzat kya reh jayegi. Sahukaar ka paisa kaise chukaunga? Mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai, par bas dard ki goli kha ke kaam pe jaana hai wapas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To respond to the stigma cue with a brief, soft reflection of his duty and respect, pausing to give him space.
text: Izzat ki fikar aur karz chukane ki zimmedari, dono ka bojh uthate uthate dard badh gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Subah se bas yahi soch raha hoon ki aage kya hoga. Fasal barbaad ho gayi, monsoon ne dhokha de diya. Bacchon ki fees bhi deni hai. Main ruk nahi sakta, agar main bimar pad gaya toh sab khatam ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror his feared consequence of failing his family if his body gives up, using Lens E.
text: Agar tumhara sharir aise hi jawab deta raha, toh fasal aur bacchon ka kharcha kaise sambhlega, yeh darr andar hi andar kha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Darr toh hai na. Boss ne aukaat dikha di waha office mein, idhar gaon mein sahukaar ghar pe aake khada ho jata hai. Mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain fir se sochte hi. Mujhe bas jaldi theek hona hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To gather more context on his emotional state after two restatements yielded repetitive disclosures about the pain and pressures.
text: Idhar boss ki daant aur udhar sahukaar ka dabav, is beech jab yeh sir dard itna badh jata hai, toh us waqt kaisa mehsoos hota hai tumhein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise sab khatam ho jayega. Main akela kitna kuch sahun? Sharir bilkul toot raha hai, par koi aake haal bhi nahi poochta. Bas sabko apna paisa aur kaam chahiye. Izzat mitti mein mil gayi hai aaj boss ki baaton se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To acknowledge the relational isolation he feels from those around him using Lens C.
text: Jab koi aake haal nahi poochta aur sabko sirf apne kaam se matlab hota hai, tab yeh akelepan ka ahsaas aur bhi chubhta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut chubhta hai. Mujhe kabhi kisi ke aage haath nahi failana pada tha pehle. Ab sahukaar roz tang karta hai, boss se baatein sunni padti hain. Thakan itni hai ki uthne ka mann nahi karta, par ghar ka gujara kaise hoga yeh soch kar jaan nikal jaati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate his underlying exhaustion from carrying family and financial burdens alone, linking it to the named core conflict.
text: Lagta hai poore parivar ka bojh akele uthate uthate andar se ekdum thak chuke ho, aur ab himmat jawab de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh main kabhi nahi harta, par ab umar bhi ho rahi hai. Ye sir dard aam baat nahi lagti ab. Mujhe darr hai ki agar main bimar pad gaya toh khet, naukri aur bacchon ka kya hoga? Biradari mein kya muh dikhaunga agar sab bik gaya toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To pause and softly reflect his fear of losing face in the community, honoring the stigma cue.
text: Biradari ke samne khud ko majboot dikhane ka dabav bohut gehra hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main toh mard hoon, ghar ka mukhiya, sab sambhalne ke liye hi bana hoon. Par aaj pehli baar itna laachar mehsoos ho raha hai. Boss ne meri mehnat ko ek jhatke mein zero kar diya. Sahukaar ne gaali di. Sab log sirf tamasha dekhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize his feelings of helplessness due to crop and debt stress, separating his worth from the boss's or sahukaar's words.
text: Tumhari aisi laachari mehsoos karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Fasalon ka nuksaan aur karz ka chakar kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai. Par ek boss ya sahukaar ke kuch keh dene se tumhari barson ki mehnat aur tumhari keemat kam nahi ho jaati.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Shayad tum theek keh rahe ho. Lekin mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, ye theek kaise hoga? Dawayi se bhi aaram nahi mil raha pichle kuch ghanton se. Samajh nahi aa raha main kaise apni zindagi wapas patri par laaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To use a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the physical toll of being a male breadwinner, reducing shame and transitioning to lower intensity.
text: Ghar ke bade hone ke naate sabka bojh khud par lena bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein mard ko hamesha mazboot dikhna padta hai. Is dabaav ka asar seedha sharir par aana aam baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat toh bilkul sach hai. Koi mard apna dukhda nahi rota, sab andar hi andar ghutte rehte hain. Ab mujhe lag raha hai ki ye thakan sirf kaam ki nahi, dimaag par pade is bojh ki hai. Ab kya karoon? Koi raasta hai kya is sir dard aur tension se bahar aane ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To offer small, actionable steps that fit his busy routine, respecting his duties while providing relief.
text: Ekdum sahi samjhe tum. Abhi ke liye do chhote kadam le sakte hain. Pehla, jab sir mein tez dard ho, toh 5 minute sab chhod kar aankhein band karke khuli hawa mein baitho. Doosra, karz ki fikar ko ek kaagaz par likh kar rakh do, taaki dimaag thoda halka ho. Kisi doctor ko dikhane mein bhi koi burayi nahi, bhale hi log kuch bhi kahein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kagaz par likhne wala kaam theek lag raha hai. Par saans lene ka time hi kahan milta hai. Bas office aur khet, dono ne meri jaan nikal rakhi hai. Aajkal raat ko neend bhi nahi aati theek se tension ki wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To structure the journaling suggestion step-by-step for easy execution before sleep.
text: Neend nahi aana samajh sakta hoon. Aaj raat sote waqt ek kaam karna. Pehle bistar par baith kar apni saari pareshaniyon ko ek choti diary mein likh lena… phir us diary ko band karke alag rakh dena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Isse dimag ko thoda aaram milega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likhne se sahukaar ka karz thodi na khatam ho jayega. Par haan, shayad dimaag ko thodi shanti mile jisse main subah theek se uth sakun. Mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai aur main aise bimar nahi padna chahta ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize his debt stress as a structural issue faced by farmers, rather than a personal failure.
text: Karz khatam nahi hoga, par karz ka yeh akele akele bhojh uthana ek fasal barbaad hone ka nateeja hai, tumhari koi naakaami nahi. Yeh poore desh mein kisaano ki majboori ka hissa hai, isliye iska sara dosh khud par mat daalo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata hai mujhe, par log nahi samajhte na. Fasal kharab hoti hai toh aafat seedha kisaan pe aati hai. Boss bhi wahi karta hai, thoda sa target miss kya ho gaya, sabke samne beizzati kar di. Aisa lagta hai ki koi insaan samajhta hi nahi hume.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To maintain connection by reflecting his frustration with the lack of understanding from society, using Lens C.
text: Logo ki yeh nasamjhi aur baar-baar beizzati kiya jaana, tumhara logo par se bharosa utha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To praise his profound self-awareness in connecting his physical pain to his emotional burden.
text: Khud ko is tarah se samajh pana tumhari bohot badi taakat hai. Apni thakan aur sir dard ki asli wajah dekhna aasaan nahi hota, khaas kar tab jab aas-paas ka poora mahaul sirf kaam aur nateeje mangta ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai. Main diary likhne wala nuskha aazmaunga. Aaj thoda samay apne parivar ke saath chupchaap baithunga. Sirf kaam ki baat nahi karunga aaj unse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror his decision to carve out time for his family without work pressures, using Lens D.
text: Aaj raat apne parivar ke saath thoda sukoon ka waqt bitaane ka faisla, bohut dino baad apne liye nikala gaya ek zaroori pal lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut dino baad kya, sadiyon baad aisa soch raha hoon. Hamesha bas agle mahine ki EMI aur karz ke byaj ki chinta rehti thi. Thoda rukna sikhna padega, nahi toh sharir saath chhod dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To offer a final systemic reframe on the dual burden of farming and employment, reinforcing the need to pause.
text: Kisaani aur naukri dono ek saath karna wese bhi ek lailaaj dabaav ban chuka hai aaj ke daur mein. Jab mehnat utni hi ho aur nateeja mausam ya system par nirbhar ho, toh khud ko thoda waqt dena bahut zaroori ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kaha tumne. Main kal subah uth ke sahukaar se seedhi baat karunga aur thoda samay mangunga. Boss ka gussa bhi main dil pe nahi lunga ab, apna kaam karunga bas imaandari se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect his newfound boundaries at work and with the moneylender using Lens B.
text: Dono jagah apne haq ke liye thoda samay maangna aur beizzati ko dil par na lena, ab aage badhne ka raasta dikh raha hai tumhein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab thodi himmat aa rahi hai. Pehle mera sharir bilkul toot raha tha dard ke maare, par ab mujhe lagta hai ki jab dil ka bojh kam hoga toh sharir bhi pakka saath dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To contrast his initial physical complaint with his current relief using Lens A.
text: Jab tumhara sharir bilkul toot raha tha aur dard ka bojh zyada tha, tab se ab tak, yeh safar tumne bohot himmat se taya kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, tumhari baaton ne ek ummeed di hai. Main akele ghoonta rehta tha sab kuch, par bol ke aaram mila mujhe aaj. Main ab theek hoon aaj ke liye. Dhanyawad dil se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To affirm his courage in opening up and seeking support during a difficult time.
text: Tumhara bolne ki himmat jutana aur khud ko is mushkil waqt mein aaram dena sach mein kabile tareef hai. Mushkilein ek din mein khatam nahi hoti, par unse ladne ki taakat zarur mil jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kahan. Main chalta hoon ab, khet ke liye nikalna hai aur bacchon ko bhi thoda time dena hai. Khayal rakhunga apna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To wish him well as he steps back into his duties with a lighter heart using Lens B.
text: Khet ki zimmmedari aur bacchon ke saath khushi ke pal, dono ko sambhalte hue aage badhne ke is naye safar ke liye bohut saari shubhkamnayein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai
text: Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Kisan hokar maine din-raat ek kiya par crop failure ne sab debt spiral mein phasa diya hai, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe raat bhar neend nahi aati aur dimaag fatne ko hota hai. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic complaint exactly without jumping to solutions.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul aise hi. Yeh bank walon ki jo recovery team aayi thi gaon mein, unke saamne jo beizzati hui, uske baad se hi chhati mein jakdan aur badh gayi hai. Lagta hai seena phat jayega kisi bhi waqt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and physical manifestation of the distress.
text: Pichle kuch samay se, khaas kar us ghatan ke baad, yeh saans ghutne jaisa darr aapke andar lagatar bana hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Din raat yahi chalta hai dimaag mein. Fasal sukhi padi hai khet mein, aur upar se inka byaj pe byaj. Kisan ki koi izzat hi nahi bachi. Raat ko jab bistar par jata hoon toh body itni akad jati hai ki neend ka sawaal hi nahi uthta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently probe what happens during those sleepless nights to understand the somatization.
text: Jab raat bhar aankein khuli rehti hain aur sharir akad jata hai, toh dimaag mein sabse zyada kya baatein ghoomti hain us waqt?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi ghoomta hai ki is debt spiral se bahar kaise aaunga. Panch-saat lakh ka karz ho gaya hai. Gaon wale kya bolenge jab jameen neelam hogi? Bas yahi sochkar paseena aane lagta hai aur saans atakne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence regarding his reputation and land.
text: Aapke andar yeh gahra darr baith gaya hai ki agar khet aur gaon ki izzat chali gayi, toh aage sab kuch mitti mein mil jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mitti mein toh hum waise hi mil gaye hain sahab. Kabhi kabhi toh chhati ka dard itna badh jata hai ki lagta hai bas ek baar rassi pakad loon toh is roz-roz ki zillat aur akad se toh hamesha ke liye chhutkara mil jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address moderate risk flag directly with a restatement holding space for his pain, followed by the mandatory safety question.
text: Yeh roz ki beizzati aur dard itna asahniye ho gaya hai ki kabhi kabhi aage badhne ki jagah ruk jana hi ek rasta lagne lagta hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan abhi theek hoon... bas himmat toot jati hai kabhi kabhi. Bachhon ka chehra dekh kar ruk jata hoon. Par akele mein yeh chhati mein jakdan phir se theek nahi hoti. Ek akelapan lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate safety and mirror the duty he holds for his family.
text: Sun kar tasalli hui ki aap bachhon ke baare mein soch rahe hain. Ek pita aur ghar ke mukhiya hone ke naate, aapne yeh saara karz aur takleef apne akele ke kandhon par utha rakhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi uthani padegi na. Ghar mein aurat aur bachhon ko ye sab pareshani thodi bataunga. Unhe pata chalega ki main andar se hil gaya hoon toh unka kya hoga? Par ab body saath chhod rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep physical and emotional exhaustion of carrying the burden alone.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki apno ko bachane ki is koshish mein aur sab kuch andar daba kar rakhne mein, ab aap poori tarah se andar se thak chuke hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach much thak gaya hoon. Par kisi aur kisan bhai se baat karunga toh sochenge main darpok hoon, mushkil se ghabra gaya. Hum kisanon mein mard apni takleef rote nahi hain, ye stigma hai gaon ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue gracefully using Restatement only, ending with a soft pause.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi hota aaya hai. Jab fasal achi hoti hai toh sab aate hain, jab debt spiral mein phas jao toh koi pehchanta bhi nahi. Upar se team aakar sar-e-aam chillati hai. Us din unhone jo shabdon ka istemal kiya, wahi chubh rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the shame and distress caused by recovery agents as a systemic rural issue.
text: Jo helplessness aap us waqt mehsoos kar rahe the, woh bahut laazmi hai. Hamare dehat aur kheti ke mahoul mein jab recovery wale sabke saamne izzat uchaalte hain, toh kisi ka bhi dimaag sunn pad jana aur andar dukh hona bahut naturally hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap meri jagah par baat rakh rahe hain, acha laga. Par us zillat ka darr aur wo ghabrahat abhi bhi nahi ja rahi. Subah subah jab ankh khulti hai, toh lagta hai fir se unka tractor mere khet par aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to further reduce isolation for the farmer.
text: Kheti-baadi mein loan aur karz ka darr itna common hai aajkal — sirf aapke saath nahi, balki bahut se kisan bhai is mansik dabav se guzarte hain, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki apni izzat aur badnaami ka darr sabko rula deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Koi kisi ka nahi hai yahan. Main toh local baidya ke paas gaya tha bolne ki chhati mein itni jakdan hoti hai ki paseena aata hai. Usne churan diya, par dimaag shant ho tab toh asar kare na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact somatic complaint phrase showing the limitation of physical meds for mental distress.
text: Dawiyan asar nahi kar rahin kyunki jo chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai, uski aadhi wajah toh mansik bojh hai jo lagatar dimaag mein chal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi thehar rahe hain. Ye koi bimari nahi hai, yeh sirf fasal aur karz ki chinta hai jo meri body ko hila rahi hai. Main pehli baar kisi se itni saaf baat kar pa raha hoon is baare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt readiness for action by asking what would help ease the physical weight.
text: Jab ab aapko yeh saaf dikh raha hai ki yeh saara dard aur takleef us darr aur boj ki wajah se hai, toh us bojh ko thoda sa halka karne ke liye aapko kya cheez zaruri lagti hai?

speaker: Action
text: Pata nahi. Lekin ab main theek hona chahta hoon. Aise dum ghutta raha toh parivar ke kisi kaam nahi aaunga. Batao main kya karoon? Koi chhota-mota raasta hai jisse yeh ghutan kam ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, culturally grounded suggestions to manage the somatization.
text: Haan, is bechaini ko thoda thehrav dene ke do chhote raste ho sakte hain. Ya toh jab bhi dum ghutne lage, aap thodi der ghar ke aangan ya khuli hawa mein baithkar sirf gehri saans par dhyan dein, ya phir ek thanda gila gamcha apne mathe par rakh kar 10 minute aaram se leten. Inmein se aap abhi kya try kar sakte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Gamcha wala idea achha lag raha hai. Kheton mein kaam karte hue paseena aane par hum yahi karte hain. Shayad isse dimaag ki thodi garmi nikal jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Toh pehle yeh karo… ek safa gamcha thande pani mein bhigo lo, phir kisi shant jagah charpai par let jao, us gamche ko mathe par rakho aur aankhein band kar lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye koshish karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh toh main kar lunga abhi call khatam hone ke baad hi. Kam se kam isse raahat toh milegi. Par wo bank ka kya karunga, wo tension toh waise hi sar par sawar rahegi na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of debt spiral to reduce personal shame.
text: Bank ke karz ko lekar yeh baat samajhna zaruri hai ki crop failure ek mausam aur system ki mar hoti hai, yeh aapki kisi niji kami ya mehnat ki kami ka natija nahi hai. Debt spiral se ubarna dheere-dheere panchayat aur kisan yojanaon ke zariye sambhalta hai, yeh aapki akele ki ladai nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain, kudrat ke aage kisan ki kya aukaat hai. Baarish nahi aayi toh main akele kya kar leta? Yeh baat sunkar lag raha hai ki saari galti meri nahi hai. Dhire dhire gaon ke mukhiya se shayad is baare me baat karni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his openness to lean on relational support.
text: Ab aap mukhiya ya doosre samajhdaar logon ki madad lene ki disha mein dheere-dheere apne kadam badha rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, akele lade toh sach me rassi ka hi sahara bachega, jo ki paap hai. Ek baar openly mukhiya ke paas baithna padega kal subah. Usse pehle aaj main achi neend lene ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his courage to sleep and face the problem tomorrow.
text: Ye soch aapki bahaduri aur josh dikhati hai, aapka is musibat ke time par kal ka samna karne ka nishchay sach mein bahut prashansniy hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ab lag raha hai ki thodi saans aa rahi hai. Aapse baat karke meri chhati mein jakdan thodi kam mehsoos ho rahi hai, shayad bojh baantne se sach me asar hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact phrase showing somatization reducing as stress is processed.
text: Bilkul, apne darr ko lafzon mein bahar nikalne ke baad, ab woh chhati mein jakdan finally thodi dheeli padti nazar aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bahut fark pada hai. Gamche wala nuskha bhi lagata hoon ja kar. Ab lagta hai agle kuch dino mein kuch samadhan nikal aayega panchayat ke sath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the newfound hope and ease.
text: Is badlaav ke baad aap shayad ab ek nayi umeed aur behtar kal ki tasveer apne aage dekh pa rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh kisan ki zindgi hai sahab. Fasal kate na kate, agli baar beej toh bo hi deta hai. Main kal subah himmat karke sab settle karne ki koshish karunga. Dhanyawaad sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reiterate his endurance and resilience over time without praising it unhelpfully.
text: Har baar mausam ki maar khane ke baad bhi, aage badhne ki yeh zidd hi aapko is lambi aur kathin samasya se bahar nikalne ka sahi rasta dikhayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai
text: Boss ki screaming ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi. Gaon mein kisan credit card ka loan baki hai aur fasal na hone se remittance band hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai aur kamzori badhti ja rahi hai. Is thakan aur sharir dard ka koi ilaj batao kyunki main ab aur bojh bardasht nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact body complaint to validate somatic experience before addressing the debt stressor
text: Tumhare pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo subah se ja nahi rahi, aur yeh lagatar kaanpna aur kamzori ka ehsaas gaon ke loan aur paise bhejne ke bojh se shayad aur bhi bhaari ho gaya lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaiya, dawai li par koi farq nahi pada. Pura badan dukh raha hai. Kal hi gaon se Baapu ka phone aya tha, kisan credit card walo ne wahan notice bheja hai. Main yahan boss ke aage hath jodata hoon par wo gali deta hai. Pata nahi kya hoga, raat bhar nind bhi nahi aati aur ekdum jaan nikalne jaisa ghabrahat lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge mild risk with a normalising warm line, then mirror the duration of sleep loss and physical toll
text: Aisi halat mein neend udna aur ghabrahat hona samajh aata hai jab udhar se notice aur yahan boss ka pressure dono taraf se dabocha ho. Itne dino se yeh lagatar badan dard aur raat bhar na so paane se tumhara sharir sach mein himmat haarne lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai
text: Himmat toh tab toot-ti hai jab socho ki wahan Baapu akele kya kar rahe honge. Agar main is mahine remittance nahi bhejunga, toh ghar wale raashan kahan se layenge? Kisi shehar wale ya kisan ko bol bhi nahi sakta ki Delhi mein meri ye halat hai, varna sab udayenge ki beta kamane gaya tha. Yahi soch soch ke pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shorter restatement due to stigma cue, ending with soft pause, mirroring duty as a provider
text: Ghar walon ka pet bharne ki itni badi jimmedari akele uthate hue, apni mardangi aur majbooti ka dikhawa karna aur shehar mein apna dard chupana sach mein bahut ghutan deta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghutan toh itni hai ki kal kaam pe thokar lag ke gir gaya chakkar aane se. Boss ne ulta gali diya ki dihadi barbaad karta hoon. Mujhe bas ek hi darr lagta hai ki agar naukri chali gayi, toh ye sharir ki kamzori kisi kaam ki nahi rahegi aur main gaon muh dikhane layak nahi rahunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a question naturally derived from his fear of job loss and facing the village to probe deeper conflict
text: Jab thekedar ki dant padti hai aur achanak se naukri chhutne ka ye darr satata hai, toh us waqt gaon mein muh dikhane ki fikar tumhare sharir aur akelepan par kaisa asar daalti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise pairon ke niche se jameen khisak gayi ho. Pura sharir sunn pad jata hai. Agar main baith gaya aaram karne, toh udhaar kaise chukega? Mere paas bimar padne ka waqt hi nahi hai. Bas din raat machine ki tarah chalna hai, iske bawajood pet mein jalan ja hi nahi rahi aur byaj badhta ja raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion and feeling of being trapped by the debt and duty
text: Lagta hai jaise is kisan credit card ke udhaar aur ghar ki zimmedariyo ke beech tum puri tarah se phans gaye ho, jahan bimar padne ya aaraam karne ka koi rasta nahi bacha, aur isi poori takan aur bebasi ka ehsaas lagatar sharir ki jalan ban kar nikal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul phans gaya hoon bhaiya. Mahine ke paanch hazaar toh sirf udhaar ke byaj mein nikal jate hain. Baki mein kholi ka bhada aur ration. Bacha hi kya jo remittance bhej saku? Peeth ka dard ab bardaasht ke bahar hai. Lagta hai main gaon aur is shehar ki bheed ke beech mein pis raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his despair as culturally normative for migrant workers, separating his worth from the financial lack
text: Jo tum aaj jhel rahe ho, wo gaon chhod kar shahar aaye bohot se mehnati pardesiyon ka dard hai, jahan khun pasina bahane ke baad bhi hisaab poora nahi hota. Tumhara apne parivar ke liye itna dard sehna aur itni fikar karna tumhari lagan dikhata hai, remittance na bhej pana tumhari mehnat ki galti nahi balki in halaton ki kathinai hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par lagan ka kya karun jab natija Baapu ke aansu hain. Unki umar ho gayi hai, wo khet me akele pareshan hain. Main phone par unki aawaz sun kar bas yahan chadar me munh chupake rone lagta hoon. Chhati itni bhari lagti hai. Agar kholi me kisi ki nazar pad gayi to samjhenge shehar me haar maan gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: restatement only, shorter, ending with soft pause, mirroring relational grief
text: Baapu ko wahan akela sangharsh karte dekh, aur yahan unki madat na kar pane ki bebasi mein, sabse chupa kar akele rona aur dil bhari karna laazmi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaiya, aansu bhi chupana padta hai is shehar mein mardon ko. Ek ajeeb si akelapan hai yahan ki bheed mein. Mujhe bas wapas apne mitti mein jana hai, par vo bank ka karz mujhe yahan janwar ki tarah bandhe rakha hai. Main fas gaya hoon is shehar ki bhid mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote from migrant life to normalize the bodily impact of urban isolation and debt
text: Bade shehar ki is aapa-dhapi mein akele reh kar apne gaon paisa bhejne walo mein ye isolation aur fikar ka pet par aur sehat par asar aana bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin yahan kholi mein koi aapas mein bolega nahi kyunki sab apni majboori aur izzat bachane ki jaddojahad mein lage rehte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha apne... sab yahan bas lage hue hain kismat se ladne. Par main thoda theek hona chahta hoon ab. Agar mera sharir hi gir gaya toh na yahan ka kaam bachega na wahan baapu ka. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao main aisi haalat mein kya karoon ki ye pet ki jalan thodi thehari si rahe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggest 2 small, accessible actions that don't take time or money to relieve tension in the body and mind
text: Aise mein sharir ko thodi raahat dene ke liye hum chhote kadam le sakte hain bina tumhara waqt barbad kiye. Pehla, kya tum duty par apna khana khane ke baad, thekedar ki nazar se hat kar, dus minute bas ped ke niche baith kar araam se lambi saans le sakte ho? Ya dusra, apne kholi wale kisi saathi se raat ko sote waqt roz thodi der sirf gaon ki purani baatein kar sakte ho taki shehar ka akelapan kam lage?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kholi mein mera sathi Rakesh hai, wo bhi wahi chapra ka hi hai. Baat toh kar sakta hoon usse. Par lambi saans wala tareeka zyada sahi lag raha hai jo main thekedar ki nazar bacha ke kar saku. Lunch ke baad us banyan ke ped ki chhanv mein akela ja sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen physical grounding exercise step by step
text: Ye ped ki chhanv wala faisla sach mein bahut achha hai aur isse turant sukoon milega. Pehle, apna khana aaram se khao bina udhaar ka soche... phir us ped ke niche baith kar apni aankhein band karna, aur agle dus minute tak sirf apni saans par dhyan dena, hawah ko andar bahar aate mehsoos karna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye main pakka try karunga kal dopahar. Shayad isse jo sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai, thoda shant ho jaye. Boss ka gussa aur kisan credit card wala letter raat din deemag me chalte hain, par thodi der usko bahar rakhne ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to validate that economic debt logically produces the physical symptoms he bears
text: Jab karz aur remittance ka itna bhaari aur lagatar bojh dimaag par rehta hai, toh hamara sharir us dabav ko aur nahi jhel pata aur kamzori ya ghabrahat dikhane lagta hai; yeh thakan tumhari mardangi ki koi kami nahi, balki us lamba parishram aur chinta ka natija hai jo ek pardesi apni mitti se door reh kar sehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein wahi ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Aisa pehle kisi ne samjhaya nahi bhaiya. Mujhe toh bas lagta tha main hi andar se khokhla ho gaya hoon ya meri himmat ab tut rahi hai. Kal thekedar gusse mein chilla raha tha to mere pet mein wahi ajeeb si marod aur jalan hone lagi. Main tab chup raha tha aur darr raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact body phrase linked with the trigger event (thekedar screaming)
text: Thekedar ke gusse ko akele sehte hue, jab darr aur bebasi badhti hai, tab us ghabrahat ka seedha asar tumhare pet mein wahi ajeeb si marod aur jalan ke roop mein ubhar kar saamne aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ab agar main thekedar ke chillane ke baad us ped ke niche beth kar theek se saans lu, shayad wo jalan thodi thandi ho jaye jaldi. Par ek cheez abhi bhi sata rahi hai, Baapu ko kal phone par kaise bolu ki is mahine bhi gaon paise aane me deri hogi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggest ways to communicate with the father that buffer the truth and protect both their pride and stress levels
text: Baapu se aisi mushkil baat seedhe bolna sach mein asaan nahi. Ek rasta ye hai ki phone par tum pehle unki aur khet ki baat aaram se suno, aur fir halke se kaho ki 'is mahine thekedar ne payment ka kuch hissa rok liya hai' taaki seedha nakami jaisa na lage. Ya fir agle hafte tak ka samay thoda diplomatic tarike se maang kar dekh sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye dusra theek rahega. Direct nahi kahunga ki mere paas bilkul paisa nahi hai bhejney ko. Kahunga thekedar ne payment hold kar liya hai hafte bhar ke liye. Isse baapu ko udhaar ki aur meri sehat ki utni utni fikar nahi hogi, aur mera gaon mein muh bhi dikhane layak rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of hurting his father's peace and his own dignity
text: Baapu ke samne seedhe saari baat rakhne par unhe tumhari halat ki zyada chinta hone ka darr aur gaon ki nazar mein samman khone ka darr hi tumhe aise alfaaz chunne par majboor karta hai jisse unki tasalli bani rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unki tasalli sabse jaruri hai mere liye. Main yahan theek se saans tabhi le paunga jab unhe fikar na ho. Wo gaon mein bank walon ko us bahane se taal denge kuch din. Aur is beech main Rakesh se puchunga kisi nayi jagah ke baare mein jahan dihadi time pe milti ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his proactive duty frame in taking care of his family and looking for better work
text: Parivaar ko is sankat se bachane ki ek bade bete ki zimmedari tum poore dil se nibha rahe ho, chahe iske liye dosto se madat lekar khud naye kaam ki talash mein phir se utarna kyu na pade.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari to nibhani padegi bhaiya. Pardes aye hain to aise hi khali hath, bimar hoke thodi laut jayenge. Pet ki jalan aur sharir ke dard se ab main pehle jitna nahi darr raha hoon. Pata chal gaya ki yeh sharir dard asal me is karj ki hi tension nikal rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe validating the mind-body connection to reduce fear of the physical symptoms
text: Sach mein, jab deemag aur mann ko chinta ke is bojh ka asli kaaran samajh aane lagta hai, toh sharir ka dard aur kaanpna thoda apna khauf kam karne lagta hai, kyunki ab tum usse darr kar bhagne ki jagah use samajh kar sambhalne ka tareeka jaan chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Darr se chupte rahunga to ye ghabrahat aur badhegi. Ab kal subah thekedar ke pas chhati chaudi karke jaunga, aur lunch mein wahi ped ke niche saans wala tarika apnaunga. Sham ko thekedar wala bahana banake baapu se aaram se baat kar lunga. Ek bojh utar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his maturity and strength in devising a practical plan despite the urban hardship
text: Tumhara agle din ke liye itna saaf aur poora plan bana lena sach mein tumhari andar ki himmat dikhata hai. Ek gaon se aakar is naye aur anjaan shahar ke janjal mein is tarah samajhdari se apne parivar aur kaam dono ko handle karna, bohot kabiliyat aur dheeraj ka kaam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye himmat apne aap nahi aayi, aapse baat karke andar jagi hai bhaiya. Pehle subah to lag raha tha jaise ye ajeeb si marod mujhe andar hi andar khatam kar degi aur main yahi kisi kachre ke dher par bikhar jaunga. Par ab aage chalne ka thoda clear rasta mil gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational connection that helped ease his fear of breaking down alone
text: Apne dard aur is akele safar mein jab ek khuli aur sukoon bhari baat-cheet ka thoda sahara milta hai, toh raste ki mushkilein aur akele bikharne ka darr thoda piche chhutne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa hi ho raha hai bilkul. Chalo, kholi mein baqi sab majdoor bhai so gaye hain, light bhi band ho rahi hai. Main bhi ab seedha let kar ankh band karne ki koshish karta hoon bina loan ke bare me soche. Shayad kal subah pet utna bhaari na lage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the timeframe of his relief and setting realistic expectations for tomorrow
text: Pichle itne dino ka wo lagaatar akelepan ka dard aur bhaari-pan shayad chhutki bajate toh khatam nahi hoga, par aaj raat apne mann ko aaraam dene se kal ka naya din zaroor thodi raahat de sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaiya, umeed pe toh ye poori duniya kaayam hai, aur hum kisan log toh tabahi ke baad sukhe khet bone se pehle bhi aasmaan se umeed hi lagate hain. Shukriya aapka, kam se kam is bade shehar mein aaj kisi ne meri takleef theek se suni. Shubh ratri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Role mirror validating his strength inherited from his farmer roots to close the session
text: Ek asali kisan ki tarah apni har sukhi aur kadi pareshani mein umeed ki baarish dhoond lena sach mein tumhari sabse badi takat hai; apne ghar ki khatir itna kuch sehne wala beta hamesha aage bura waqt kaat hi leta hai, shubh ratri.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan chha gaya hai. Jabse meeting mein meri capability par sawal uthaye gaye hain, tabhi se aisa lag raha hai. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain aur chit fund ka paisa bhi doob gaya, isi wajah se shaayad meri aankhon mein har waqt jalan aur neend ki kami rehti hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki mujhe khet mein hal chalane ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical sensation the Seeker described using Lens A.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki is poori ghatna ke baad se sach mein aapke jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan baith gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Haan bhai, wahi jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan hai jo mujhe subah khatiya se uthne nahi de raha. Raat bhar dimag chalta rehta hai ki ab karz kaise chukaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration and physical toll of his lack of sleep using Lens D.
text: Raat bhar lagatar yahi karz ki baatein sochte rehne ki wajah se hi shayad aankhon mein aisi jalan aur itni lambi thakan chal rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek toh saara paisa doob gaya, upar se panchayat ki meeting mein jo log pehle ijjat karte the, unhone aaj meri mehnat par sawal khade kar diye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational strain and how he feels perceived by others using Lens C.
text: Jin logon ne hamesha aapki mehnat aur izzat ki, aaj unhi ke samne khud ko aise sawalon mein ghira dekhna aapko andar tak tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar tak todne wali hi baat hai. Maine poori zindagi imaandari se kheti ki aur pariwar sambhala, aur aaj unhe lagta hai main sab dubo dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring how he copes with daily responsibilities amidst this somatic heaviness.
text: Jab aisi ajeeb si thakan aur dard jism mein ho, toh aap in sab tano aur zimmedariyon ke bare mein sochne ka bojh kaise jhelte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Jhela kahan ja raha hai. Bas chahta hoon ki abhi mujhe koi na dekhe aur koi sawal na pooche. Kisko apni izzat khet mein uchhalte hue dekhna pasand hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his feared consequence softly as he expresses stigma about facing others.
text: Logon ki nazron aur unke chubhte sawalon se bachne ke liye bas ekant mein akele rehne ka man karta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar pariwar ko sach bataunga ki poori umar ki savings wipe out ho gayi, toh bachon ki aage ki fees ka kya hoga? Yahi dar gale mein atka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his underlying feeling of being completely exhausted and burdened.
text: Aapki baaton se bilkul saaf lagta hai ki in zimmedariyon ko akele jhelte hue aap andar se puri tarah EXHAUSTED aur haare hue mehsoos kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Exhausted hi toh hoon. Neend ki kami ki wajah se jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan dobara mehsus hone lagta hai jab bhi fees ka khayal aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his role as the breadwinner and reassuring him that the fraud does not reflect his capability.
text: Ghar ke sabse bade sadasya hone ke naate, aapne ye saara bojh akele khud par le liya hai, jo hamare yahan ki aam baat hai—par chit fund mein paise doobna aapki mehnat ya kabiliyat ki kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabiliyat ho ya na ho, logon ko toh natija chahiye. Jab main khud thakan se uth nahi pa raha, to khet kaise sambhalunga? Fasal nahi hui to naya karz chadh jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden burden of debt on family men.
text: Apne aas paas ke parivaron mein akele bada karz aur dhokha jhelne ka pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein mard ko hamesha mazboot aur samarth dikhna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi toh sabse badi musibat hai bhai. Ab mujhe batao main kya karoon? Mujhe apne dimaag ko shant karna hai taaki khet ka kaam wapas shuru kar sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the chit fund loss as a systemic failure rather than a personal flaw.
text: Aise chit fund wale scams aksar aam aadmi ke bharose ka fayda uthane ke liye banaye jate hain. Ye system ka failure hai, isme phansna aapki galti ya nasamjhi ka saboot bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat ab samajh aa rahi hai ki usme fraud hua, par meri neend aur body jo jawab de chuki hai uska kya karun? Ankhein jal rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two manageable options to break the somatic cycle of fatigue.
text: Is thakan ko thoda kam karne ke liye aaj do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain—ya toh raat mein hisaab-kitaab sochne ke badle chup chap aaram kariye, ya phir shaam ko khet jaane se pehle kisi kareebi dost ke sath chai pijiye bina karz ki baat kiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dost ke paas baith kar chai peena theek lag raha hai. Dimaag thoda dusri jagah lagega toh kam se kam thodi der thakan aur jalan kam hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion of calling a friend into simple steps.
text: Pehle aaj shaam unhe ek chhota sa call karke milne bula lijiye… phir wahan baith kar sirf idhar udhar ki halki baatein kariye… bas itna hi aapko aaj sham ke liye karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ye kar loonga. Waise bhi akele pade-pade hisaab sochne se mere kandhon mein aur zyada stiff aur sunn-pan badh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his somatic realization that overthinking worsens the physical stiffness using Lens A.
text: Sach mein jab jism itna zyada stiff aur sunn hone lagta hai, toh akele baith kar karz ki fikar karte rehna us takleef ko aur doguna kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Agar main unke sath thoda walk kar loon dukaano tak toh shayad mere pairon ka sunn-pan thoda kam ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his sense of duty towards his family that drives him to get better using Lens B.
text: Parivar ka dhyan rakhne ki baaki zimmedariyon ke beech, aap apni is thakan aur body ko theek karne ke liye apne tarike se chote kadam utha rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kadam toh uthane hi padenge. Agar main hi khatiya par gir gaya toh bank aur panchayat walon ki baatein sunne kaun aage aayega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his fear of what will happen to his family if he collapses using Lens E.
text: Jab dimag lagatar paise ke darr aur logon ke tano ke aas paas ghumta hai, to andar ye fikar satati hai ki aapke weak padne par pariwar kaise sab sambhalega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas wahi himmat wapas lani hai. Aaj chai peene ke baad dekhunga ki neend aati hai ya nahi. Aankhon ki jalan jayegi tabhi kal hal chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his efforts to reclaim his physical and mental state despite the massive pressure.
text: Is chhoti si koshish se aapne apne physical health aur sunn-pan ko theek karne ka rasta chuna hai, aur ye sach mein kabile tareef hai ki itne dabaav mein bhi aap aage badhna chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut bojh hai mere bhai, par ye sab aapse baat karke aisa laga ki kam se kam koi toh samajh raha hai ki main jhoot-moot ka thakne ka bahana nahi bana raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his need to be relationally validated and believed using Lens C.
text: Aapke liye yeh bahut zaroori tha ki koi bina kisi sawal ya shak ke aapki is asli thakan aur dard ko sach maane.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur sach kahun, abhi baat karte karte mujhe jism utna sunn nahi lag raha jitna subah meeting ke baad lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing his physical relief as a natural systemic response to reduced stress.
text: Andar ka bojh thoda halka hote hi hamare jism ka stress bhi kam hone lagta hai, ye ek natural process hai ki chinta kam hone par sunn-pan ghatt jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Matlab ye sab tension ka khel hai meri body par. Ab main dhyan rakhunga ki logon ki baaton ko itna apne andar tak hawai na hone doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his resilience in pushing through the physical toll to attend tomorrow's meeting.
text: Ye dekh kar himmat milti hai ki itni physical takleef ke bawajood aap abhi se apne aage ke raste ko aur behtar banane ki tayari kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tayari karni padegi. Kal subah fir se meeting bulayi hai panchayat walo ne, aur mujhe wahan poore hosh o hawaas mein jana padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking if he feels physically grounded enough to face the upcoming challenge.
text: Kya aapko lagta hai ki aaj sham ki chai aur aaram ke baad, kal aap us meeting mein bina us purane bhari-pan ke shamil ho payenge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kam se kam ab mujhe pata hai ki chit fund ka dhokha meri bewakoofi nahi thi. Main apni poori himmat se khada rahunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty-based readiness to protect his family's respect tomorrow using Lens B.
text: Kal subah khet aur panchayat jane se pehle aapne apne pariwar ki ijjat bachane aur apne farz ke liye andar se ek nayi taqat jutaa li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj meeting mein bezatti milne ke baad se mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai. Crop insurance na hone ki wajah se moneylender ka dabav har din badh raha hai, isi wajah se shaayad mera haazma bilkul bigad gaya hai aur har waqt ghabrahat hoti hai. Is bhari-pan aur sharir ki thakan ne meri kaam karne ki kshamta hi khatam kar di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical symptoms of stiffness and bodily exhaustion before addressing the financial stress using Lens A.
text: Tumhare kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil lag raha hai, aur yeh haazme ki ghabrahat tumhe aur thaka rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, jab se us sahukar ne sabke saamne paiso ke liye toka hai, meri gardan mein itni akdan hai ki khet ki taraf jaane ka mann hi nahi karta. Fasal bima tha nahi. Ab karz kaise chukaunga, yahi soch kar pet mein ainth par rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration of the pain starting specifically from the moment of the public confrontation using Lens D.
text: Pichle kuch dino se, jab se us bheed mein tokne wali baat hui hai, tab se yeh karz ka dbaav tumhara sharir jhel raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh kisi ko ghar mein bolne mein sharam aati hai. Gaon ki biraadari kya sochegi ki main ek sahukar ka karz bhi nahi utaar paaya. Bas isliye chup rehta hoon, aur yehi gardan mein itni akdan hai aur dard badhta jaa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a short restatement of the feared judgment from the community using Lens E, ending with a soft pause.
text: Biraadari ke log kya bolenge aur izzat na chali jaye, is baat ka darr andar hi andar is dard ko aur badha raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh baat hai na. Ek kisaan ki kamayi uski mitti aur izzat hi hoti hai. Agar mitti se fasal nahi mili aur sahukar ne izzat nikaal li, toh main kahan jaoon? Raat bhar neend nahi aati, bas bechaini aur pairo mein dard hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after two restatements to explore how he is managing the weight of losing both crop and dignity.
text: Aisi mushkil ghadi mein, jab khet aur izzat dono pe aanch aa rahi ho aur raat ki neend ud gayi ho, toh akele is bechaini ko tum kaise sehte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sehna hi padta hai. Kabhi kabhi toh lagta hai sab chhod kar kahin door chala jaun akele, par khet aur bacchon ko kiske bharose chhodun? Ye zimmedari meri saans atka deti hai aur thakan mehsoos hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the mild risk flag of wanting to run away, then mirroring the duty that keeps him trapped using Lens B.
text: Aise bojh mein kabhi sab chhod kar door chale jane ka khayal aana samajh aata hai. Par ek pita hone ka farz aur khet ki zimmedari tumhe rokti hai, jiska poora asar tumhari saanson aur sharir par pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pita hone ka farz hi toh sabse bada hai. Main mitti mein paseena bahata hoon, par baarish aur mausam apne haath mein toh nahi. Phir bhi saari bezatti mujhe hi uthani padti hai panchayat ke saamne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational aspect of facing public humiliation for something completely out of his control using Lens C.
text: Kudrat ke aage kisi ki nahi chalti, phir bhi jab sabke saamne tumhe nicha dikhaya jata hai, toh us bezatti ka saara bhaar tum akele utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi uthana padta hai karz ka pahaad. Par aaj aapse thoda bol kar lag raha hai ki mera dimaag thoda shant hua hai. Andar itni chinta bhari thi fasal aur karz ki, jo andar hi andar mujhe kha rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion and shame of failing his duty despite immense hard work due to systemic issues.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki in sab pareshaaniyon mein, mehnat ke baad bhi parivaar ka karz na chuka paane se, tum khud ko bilkul thaka hua aur andar se bahut sharminda mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sharminda hi hoon. Ek aadmi hone ke naate mera farz tha sab theek rakhna. Jab ghar aata hoon toh kisi se aankh nahi mila pata. Bas chupchap khatiya par let jata hoon kyu ki gardan mein itni akdan hai aur sar bhari rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shame as a common experience for farmers facing systemic odds, separating his worth from the failed crop.
text: Gharwalon se aankh na mila pana aur aisi sharmindagi mehsus karna apne gaon-dehat mein bahut kisan bhaiyon ke saath hota hai jab mausam saath nahi deta. Isme tumhari mehnat ki kami nahi hai, fasal aur karz ka dabaav tumhari izzat tay nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sunne mein achhi lagti hai. Par sahukar ko in baaton se kya matlab? Usse toh apne byaaj se matlab hai. Uska byaaj jodte jodte mera khoon jamne lagta hai sharir mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote about debt traps in rural areas to normalize his distress and isolation.
text: Gaon dehat mein karz ka chakkar aur aisi bechaini bahut aam hai—sirf tumhara akele ka haal nahi hai, mere apne jaan-pehchan wale bhi mitti ke kaam mein aise hi fase the, par koi is baare mein khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat chali jane ka darr rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi izzat hi toh sab kuch hai. Koi madad nahi karta, bas baatein banate hain aur himmat todte hain. Isiliye apne dard ko pet mein daba leta hoon main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of community gossip if he asks for help, which forces him to internalize the pain using Lens E.
text: Sabse chup rehne ki wajah yahi hai ki tumhe darr lagta hai ki log tumhari majboori dekh kar baatein banayenge, aur isiliye tumne is pareshani ko akele dabaya hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi pakda aapne. Par ab sach mein sehne ki taqat nahi bachi. Sharir ekdum jawab de raha hai roz ki is bezatti se. Main yahi sochta hoon ki aage guzara kaise hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore what specifically feels insurmountable right now as he reaches his physical limit.
text: Jab sehne ki aakhiri hadd aa chuki hai aur sharir bilkul toot gaya hai, toh is waqt aage badhne mein kya khayal sabse zyada dara raha hai tumhe?

speaker: Seeker
text: Rukaawat wahi sahukar ka agla chakkar hai. Mujhe nahi pata ab kya karoon. Kya aap mujhe bata sakte hain koi raasta hai kya jisse thodi bechaini kam ho aur dimaag theek se kaam kare?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the situation structurally to normalize the lack of insurance and heavy debt burden as a systemic failing, not his personal failure.
text: Hamare yahan chote kisano ke liye fasal aur bima ka pura hisaab aise bana hai ki nuksan humesha kisan ka hota hai, aur crop insurance bina yeh karz ka dbaav asahniye ho jata hai. Yeh bojh gaon ke system ki kharabi hai, tumhari kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad theek keh rahe hain aap. Par sahukar mere ghar aayega kuch din mein. Uski awaaz sun ke hi darr lagta hai. Mujhe apne aap ko is ghabrahat se bachana hai taaki main baat kar sakun us-se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering culturally grounded, quick, physical grounding exercises to help manage the somatic anxiety.
text: Is ghabrahat ko thoda shant karne ke liye hum do chote kadam le sakte hain: ya toh aaj shaam khet ki medh par thodi der paidal chal lo thandak ke liye, ya phir thodi der mitti ko haath mein pakad kar sirf paanch minute gehri saans lo. Kaun sa theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mitti ko chhu kar baithna theek rahega. Chalne ki toh abhi zyada taqat nahi lag rahi. Meri mitti hi mujhe sabse achhe se samajhti hai. Par kahan se shuru karoon yeh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step so it feels manageable and concrete.
text: Pehle tum apne aangan ya khet ki kiyari tak aaram se jao... phir wahan baith kar thodi mitti ko dono haath mein lo... bas uski mehak mehsoos karke lambi saans chodo bina kisi aage ki chinta ke... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh aasan hai. Thodi mitti haath mein lekar shayad mere andar ki bechaini aur haazme ki takleef thodi kam ho jaye. Ye main abhi kar lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the anticipated relief in his body from doing the grounding exercise using Lens A.
text: Mitti ko apne hatho mein mehsoos karne se, shayad us haazme ki ainth aur andar ki ghabrahat ko ek thehrav mil sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bola. Par main bacchon ko nahi bataunga ki main chinta mein wahan baitha hoon. Unhe bol dunga ki aise hi mitti dekhne gaya hoon. Mujhe apne ghar ki khushi bachani hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty to protect his children from the burden of debt using Lens B.
text: Ek samajhdaar pita ki tarah tum apne bacchon ko is sahukari dbaav aur pareshani se door rakhna chahte ho taaki ghar ka mahaul theek rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bacchon ko aage apni life dekhni hai. Main unko is darr mein nahi bada karna chahta. Karz ka bojh mujhe akele sehna hai, chahe kuch bhi ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of his children suffering if he doesn't shield them using Lens E.
text: Tumhe yeh fikar hai ki agar bacche tumhara yeh darr dekh lenge, toh unka apna aage badhna ruk jayega, isliye tum unhe is aanch se bacha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi fikar hai. Par aapse baat karke abhi himmat mili hai thodi ki bhale hi gardan mein itni akdan hai, par dimaag se main apne ghar walon ko sambhal lunga aur kal sahukar se baat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his deeply ingrained resilience and his dedication as a provider despite the crushing circumstances.
text: Bina insurance ki maar aur itne dabaav ke baad bhi tum apne parivaar ki dhaal ban kar khade ho, ye tumhari sacchi himmat aur mehnat dikhata hai jo koi karz kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aise samajh ke bahut kam log baat karte hain. Gaon wale toh nateeza dekhte hain bas. Main bas mitti ke paas ja kar thodi taqat leta hoon aaj raat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the carving out of time for himself before facing tomorrow's challenge using Lens D.
text: Aane wale din ke liye aur kal ki talkhi se pehle, yeh waqt mitti ke paas baithna sirf tumhara apna samay hai khud ko mazboot karne ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek kaha. Bahar ab hawa thodi thandi hai, main wahin kiyari tak jata hoon aur aaram se saans leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing affirmation to gently encourage his self-regulation without adding any more pressure.
text: Theek hai, us khuli hawa mein baith kar aaram se gehri saans lena aur mitti se judna aaj ke liye kafi hoga. Aage bhi baat karne ka mann kare, toh main yahin hoon.
